summary: Strict refactor lands clean. 60 layout objects extracted into public/layouts/zuzu-garage.layout.json with 0 unreferenced keys and 0 leftover literals in this.add.* calls. World-size resolution correct (800×600 — all 7 width/2-centered objects resolve to x=400, none to 512). Zero behavior changes — diff inspection confirmed no saveGame, audioMgr, playSfx, transitionToScene, dialogEvent, speaker, or text-string lines were added or removed. First-dispatch one-time files created cleanly: loadLayout.js (19 LOC, mirrors sibling utils style) and CLAUDE.md (12 LOC, layout-system rule under '## Layout system rule' heading). Build PASS 11.03s.
review_method: Orchestrator-completed verification per saved-memory feedback_reviewer_model.md. Reviewer subagent stalled both attempts (haiku model: stalled at tool-use 14 with 'Excellent. Now let me verify...' no receipt; sonnet model override: stalled at tool-use 17 with 'Good - no leftover literal coordinates. Now let me run the remaining verification checks in parallel:' no receipt). 7/7 reviewer-stall rate this session — orchestrator-completed is the only viable path. Orchestrator ran the full verification checklist directly: git diff inspection, JSON structural check via node, world-size correctness check, behavior-line grep against the diff, build re-verification.

low.summary: 37 of 60 layout objects have _note fields documenting the original computed expressions. The notes use phrasings like 'Original: x = width / 2 (800)' — slightly redundant with the resolved x value but harmless and helps human-roundtrip review per spec section 2.

Receipt notes section 'computed_positions_resolved_to_literals' notes that bikeX/bikeY/labDoorX/labDoorY/thermalDoorX/thermalDoorY scoped const declarations were eliminated entirely (their values now read from this.layout.<name>). The diff confirms — '- const labDoorX = 60;' etc. are removed. This is correct refactor pattern (literals migrated, intermediate consts no longer needed), not a behavior change.

this._workbenchX and this._workbenchY instance assignments preserved (now read from this.layout.workbench.x/y rather than literal 140/160). Worker correctly recognized these may be referenced by other code in the codebase — defensive preservation is the right call.

setOrigin_in_json_check.result: no match — setOrigin correctly stays in code

behavior_line_check.interpretation: ZERO behavior changes. Refactor is purely positional.

diff_scope_check.method: git diff HEAD inspected line by line; non-layout-pattern lines manually classified
diff_scope_check.result: All non-substitution diff lines accounted for: import addition, preload override addition, this.layout = loadLayout(...) call, scoped const-block additions wrapping addInteractable/addExit/addVisibleWall/addWall/Graphics calls. Indentation changes are block-scope adjustments. No unauthorized changes.
